raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX XXXX  Amex allowed charges totaling {$20000.00} in a single night to be charged to my account XXXX I have had this Amex account for 38 years and the highest monthly balance ever was ~ {$10000.00} Not only did they did not alarm me to this unusual activity but after I disputed the charges they demanded I provide them with my personal banking statements and paycheck copies so they can do a financial review of my account. They requested this information AFTER they had already allowed the fraudulent charges to be added to my account. 

I refused to provide my personal financial information, so they canceled all my Amex accounts, so I guess my 38 years of prompt payments and loyalty meant nothing. 

I demanded they remove the {$20000.00} in fraudulent charges from my account and they refused.
